ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "link_to_content" TEXT /* URL or link to the content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the resource */,
  "level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the resource */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Type of modality used (e.g., Listening, Reading) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered by the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the resource */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the resource (for listening materials) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the resource file */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the resource */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the resource is active and available for use */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been downloaded */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator who uploaded the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_modality FOREIGN KEY ("modality") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family to which it belongs */,
  "num_speakers" INTEGER /* Estimated number of speakers */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "native_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of native speakers */,
  "second_language_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of second language speakers */,
  "is_endangered" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the language is endangered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the proficiency level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "estimated_completion_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required to complete the level */,
  "prerequisite_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the modality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modality */,
  "is_interactive" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the modality is interactive */,
  "supported_devices" TEXT /* List of devices supported by the modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the topic is popular */,
  "related_topics" TEXT /* List of related topics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the feedback has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the feedback has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account associated with the educator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the educator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the educator */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institution where the educator is affiliated */,
  "teaching_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the educator is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload log */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the upload has been approved by an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
